query.original: Can you cast a spell and also make a weapon attack in the same turn without any special features?
query.used: Can you cast a spell and also make a weapon attack in the same turn without any special features?

answer:
Based on the provided context, you can only cast a spell as a bonus action if it is a cantrip with a casting time of 1 action. Therefore, you cannot cast a spell and make a weapon attack in the same turn without any special features.

However, you can make a weapon attack as part of your action, and you can interact with one object or feature of the environment for free during your move or action. So, you could potentially pick up a weapon as a free interaction during your move, and then use your action to make a weapon attack. But you cannot cast a spell and make a weapon attack in the same turn without any special features.

The mention of interacting with an object and picking up a weapon, while true, is somewhat tangential and does not directly address the core of the user's question.
